Non-Binding Term Sheet — Strategic Investment in Shenzhen Nebula Robotics Co., Ltd. (fictional PRC issuer; intended SSE STAR Market listing)
Issuer: Shenzhen Nebula Robotics Co., Ltd.; USCC: 91440300MA5U9Z9Z9X (invalid checksum, template use); Tax ID: same as USCC; Reg. Address: Unit 1201, Tower C, No. 88 Xinghe Rd., Nanshan District, Shenzhen, Guangdong, PRC
Investor: Yutu Star Capital (Qianhai) L.P.; USCC: 91440300MA8T0Q0Q0Z (invalid checksum, template use); Contact (dept mailbox): legal@nebula-robotics.cn; Correspondence Address: Room 2107, Block B, Qianhai Hub, Shenzhen, Guangdong, PRC
Structure: Investor to subscribe for a minority equity stake in Issuer; no control change contemplated; closing subject to board approvals and regulatory clearances; no pricing terms set out herein
Disclosure & MNPI: Issuer represents that all information necessary for this term sheet has been publicly disclosed through designated media; no “inside information” (内幕信息) per PRC Securities Law; reference to already-published notices dated 2025-03-18 on the SSE website
Regulatory: Filings/registrations as applicable with CSRC and Shanghai Stock Exchange for any share issuance; antitrust notification to SAMR if statutory thresholds are triggered; any NDRC/commerce registrations to be completed as required by law
Data Compliance: Parties will comply with PIPL, CSL, and DSL; personal information processing limited to transaction necessity; if any outbound transfer arises, CAC Standard Contract filing or security assessment will be completed prior to transfer
Employment: No change to existing labor contracts; no collective layoffs, non-solicitation of key staff for 12 months; any employee onboarding post-investment to follow lawful basis and minimum-necessary principles, with special protection for minors under 14 and prohibition on their data collection absent guardian consent
Onboarding/KYC (template only): Form fields — 姓名/身份证号/护照号/联系电话/联系地址 (do not complete or transmit in this draft); HR mailbox for submissions: hr@nebula-robotics.cn (departmental contact)
Authorized Signatory (role only; single identifier provided for template illustration): PRC Resident ID No. 44030119900101123A (invalid checksum; not for actual use)
Settlement Mechanics (corporate only): Closing funds to Issuer’s RMB account at Bank of Nanyun, Qianhai Sub-branch (fictional); Account No.: 3888-0000-0000-TEST; no personal accounts shall be used; tax invoices to be issued to the Investor’s tax ID as above
Helpline and Public Contacts (benign): CSRC investor service 12386; Shenzhen Government 12345; State Taxation 12366; these public hotlines are listed for general guidance only and are not transaction contacts
Cross-Border Data: No cross-border personal information transfer will occur unless required by the transaction and then only after (i) completion of a PIPIA, (ii) execution of CAC Standard Contract, and (iii) record-filing with the provincial CAC; production data to be localized per CSL MLPS 2.0 requirements
DSL/CSL Representations: Issuer confirms no operation of critical information infrastructure and that data inventory/classification has been completed; any “important data” will be ring-fenced and excluded from the scope of information exchange with the Investor
Governing Law/Dispute Resolution: PRC law governs; disputes to be submitted to Shenzhen Court of International Arbitration; non-reliance applies to any forward-looking statements; no guarantee or undertaking to proceed until definitive agreements are executed
Binding Effect/Term: This term sheet is non-binding (save for confidentiality, exclusivity, fees, and governing law); automatically expires 30 days from date of last signature unless extended by mutual written consent
